day: # This file is the source of truth for known retail observations that we
# bot_cpi backfill adapter - the BoT CPI series multiplies these anchors
# to fill months that have neither a live scrape
# The rows below are desk estimates based on publicly-reported Thai
# retail prices for these three staples. They are marked ``seed:estimate``
# so the "Source mix" panel bins them honestly and so they can be
# replaced by ``seed:receipt`` rows as real receipts are collected.
#                     price changes reported in Thai business press.
#   net_weight        Canonical units: g for solids
#   unit_type         "g" or "ml" - matches the DB CHECK constraint.

note: first retail raise during 2022 price shock
